title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers outlines five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations and token waste in agentic systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails encoded in Python, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use Strands Agents framework with OpenAI, swappable with Bedrock, Anthropic, or Llama.
